subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #032 "Many are Called, but Few are Chosen"
subcodes.first_line: Know that the order and perfection of the universe require that existence be resolved into countless forms.
subcodes.first_line_orig: بدان که نظم و کمال در جامعیت عالم وجود چنین اقتضا نماید که وجود منحل بصور غیر متناهی
subcodes.subjects: @many are called but few are chosen, @perfection; imperfection of nature, @development of capacity and readiness, @diversity an attribute; requirement of existence, @differences in human capacity, @progress only takes place within its own degree
